originalAlarm.description: Value stored to 'x' during its initialization is never read

model:
(define-fun CONFIG_UNIX98_PTYS () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_DEVPTS_MULTIPLE_INSTANCES () Bool
  true)
reasoning: 7acf6cd80b2.c L8: 'int x = *inode' known dead store (// ERROR (7)). x is assigned the dereferenced inode value but never subsequently read. PC: CONFIG_DEVPTS_MULTIPLE_INSTANCES=T (CONFIG_UNIX98_PTYS cancels — both T and F variants present), correctly identifying when this function exists (inside #ifdef CONFIG_DEVPTS_MULTIPLE_INSTANCES). Known bug. Correctly constrained PC. Consistent with TRANSFORMATION_30 and TRANSFORMATION_83 (both TRUE).
